direction: Higher = more women represented among tertiary STEM graduates
interpretation_note: Women as a percentage of tertiary STEM graduates.

direction: Higher = larger male advantage in youth coding activity
interpretation_note: Gender gap in the share of 16-24-year-olds who wrote computer code in the last 12 months.

direction: Higher = larger male advantage in labour-force participation
interpretation_note: Gender gap in labour force participation rate, ages 15-74.

direction: Higher = larger wage inequality / worse pay outcome for women
interpretation_note: Median gender wage gap, expressed relative to men's wages.

direction: Higher = women are more concentrated in part-time employment relative to men
interpretation_note: Gender gap in the incidence of part-time employment among employees.

direction: Higher = more women represented in senior and middle management positions
interpretation_note: Women as a percentage of senior and middle management positions.
